name: Team Joe
subject: Jay Leno & John Legend & Barbra Streisand & Peter this Sunday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us on Sunday for performances and conversations with some of your favorite musicians and entertainers! |
---
Peter, we have some exciting news:

This Sunday, July 26th, at 8 PM eastern time, you are invited to our Celebration of Change, a virtual concert for all of our grassroots supporters!

**Check out the incredible lineup and make sure to tune in at[www.joebiden.com/live](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9655/1772742372/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/live/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") on Sunday, July 26th at 8PM EDT:** | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9655/1772742372/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/live/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Join us on Sunday for performances and conversations with some of your favorite musicians and entertainers! We're so excited to unite for this Celebration of Change, and to talk about why we're all on Team Joe and ready to win this thing in November.

**To watch, all you have to do is go to[www.joebiden.com/live](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9655/1772742372/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/live/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") on Sunday, July 26th at 8PM EDT and you'll be able to catch the program.**

Peter, we're grateful to have you on our team fighting to defeat Donald Trump. We hope this concert will be both a fun, uplifting activity for you, your family, and friends, and also a reminder of the kind of change we can make when we come together and fight for it.

So again, thank you for being here, for staying engaged. We say it a lot, but we are so thankful to have you in this fight with us -- and we're excited to show you our gratitude at this virtual celebration!

We'll see you on Sunday night!

Team Joe
[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.20_B3_celebration_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9653/1772742372/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9652/1772742372/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9651/1772742372/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9650/1772742372/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964f/1772742372/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964e/1772742372/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964d/1772742372/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964c/1772742372/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964b/1772742372/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964a/1772742372/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964d/1772742372/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9649/1772742372/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d964c/1772742372/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b87b/1cd0ac28/1707d6d46/357d9648/1772742372/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: The gun lobby's puppet in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The NRA pulls the strings and Sen. Cornyn takes their money.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c56/2742239079/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **[Stand up to Sen. Cornyn and the gun lobby!>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c55/2742239079/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200720.3nd__1752__&amount=10")** Peter -- Sen. Cornyn is one of the **top recipients of NRA money in Texas** , and it's obvious why.

He _proudly_ boasts about his "perfect A+" rating from the NRA on his Senate website, and over his nearly 20 years in Washington, he's opposed every meaningful effort to improve gun safety, no matter how popular.
* Universal background checks? He opposes them.
* "Red flag" laws? He opposes them.
* Stopping domestic abusers getting guns? He opposes that, too.

**[Fight back against the NRA](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c55/2742239079/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200720.3nd__1752__&amount=10")** Even after multiple mass shootings in our own state, Sen. Cornyn has refused to act to pass even the most widely popular, bipartisan solutions.He even cashed a check from them just weeks after the El Paso shooting, before refusing yet again to take action on universal background checks.

MJ won't cower before the NRA. She's been endorsed by Giffords, Brady PAC, Everytown for Gun Safety, and Moms Demand Action because she's a responsible gun owner and veteran who knows we can do so much more to keep our communities safe.

**Keeping our communities safe starts with defeating Sen. Cornyn and electing MJ. Are you with us?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c54/2742239079/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200720.3nd__1752__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c4a/2742239079/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200720.3nd__1752__&amount=25")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef7/7f51f7bc/41ad9784/4ef65c55/2742239079/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200720.3nd__1752__&amount=10")**

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Attend our lunch with Senator Tom Cotton
body:
I'm proud to have Senator Tom Cotton's endorsement.
Peter,I'm proud to have Senator Tom Cotton's endorsement in our race for U.S. Senate and I'm pleased to announce **he's joining us in Clarksville this Friday!** I wanted to make sure you had a chance to attend this great event:[**RSVP for Our Lunch with Senator Cotton in Clarksville on July 24th at 12:00pm CT**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-r/) [RSVP FOR OUR LUNCH WITH SENATOR COTTON](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-y/) I'm very grateful to have the support of President Trump, Senator Cotton, and over 1,000 local leaders across Tennessee.Business leaders, law enforcement officers and community leaders across all 95 counties know that I'm the proven Trump conservative in this race. With early voting now underway, it's critical we keep organizing to get out the vote! Can you join us at this event? [**RSVP here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-j/) Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdjdhtd-fuutjhhtj-u/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

| - We had record breaking 2020 Democratic voter turnout in the runoff on July 14 — **2.57 times** more than 2018! name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
subject: what Hagerty’s attacks have done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
A new poll came out today and we can see EXACTLY how effective his smears have been.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, A new poll released today shows the state of our race unchanged - **we’re still in a dead heat.** | Latest Poll Results
---
Bill Hagerty | 30%
Dr. Manny Sethi | 27%
George Flinn | 3%
Unsure / Undecided | 32%

No matter how much money he puts behind them, Tennesseans aren’t buying Bill Hagerty’s smears. He’s been full-on attacking us for a week, and made zero headway.
That’s the good news.
**But here’s the bad news: Hagerty’s spending another $1.1 million dollars this week alone smearing me and our campaign. We have to fight back this week. **[**https://secure.winred.com/dr-manny-for-us-senate/new-poll**](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-j/)
[DONATE NOW - HELP US TAKE THE LEAD](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-t/)
Bill Hagerty’s attacks aren’t sticking on us. But ours stick on him - he’s an Establishment RINO who’s donated megabucks to Mitt Romney, and even Al Gore. He not only supports Common Core, his company made millions off of it.
He’s EXACTLY the kind of candidate conservatives don’t want.
That’s why we need to keep pushing. **People are already voting early, right now. We must make sure every Tennessee Republican gets the facts about Bill Hagerty before they mark their ballot.**
That’s why we’re asking for your help to get our ad in front of Tennessee voters during these critical days.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-i/)

Watch our new ad now
[WATCH THE AD THAT WILL WIN THE ELECTION](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-d/)
Our grassroots campaign can’t call in millions from the banks, or empty our trust fund to buy more airtime. We’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you to get us across the finish line.
Friend, we are so, so close. Please - any amount you can give in these critical days will be a huge help. We’re counting on you.
[DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdjtydd-olhhkyhhid-h/)
Thanks for your support,
Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
Campaign Manager
Dr. Manny for Senate

Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: Watch: Abigail’s new TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=)
---
| Dear Peter, Our campaign released our first television ad today, and I wanted you to be the first to see it: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=) This ad, titled "Called to Serve," focuses on Abigail's record of public service and her commitment to serving the people of Central Virginia. We have one of the most competitive races in the country, and the winner could come down to just a handful of votes. **That 's why it's crucial we get Abigail's message to every last voter in VA-07. ** Abigail has served the people of Central Virginia with integrity and always puts the needs of her constituents and her focus on solving problems first. She works across party lines to get things done. I am proud of her work, and we need to spread her ad far and wide to let others know her impact, too. _**[Can you make a contribution right now to help us show this ad to everyone across VA-07?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=)**_ Our opponent and his allies will be spending millions against us on negative attack ads to try and drown out our message and cast doubt on Abigail's record of service. **Our victory in November is going to come down to whether Abigail 's hopeful message and record of focused, steady leadership is heard over the noise. ** This campaign is focused on the critical issues that matter to Virginians, like rising healthcare and prescription drug costs, the reopening concerns of small businesses, and the need for expanded opportunity for the next generation. At the core of our campaign is the belief that meaningful conversations - not extreme partisan attacks - are how we bring people into our campaign and how we'll win this election. _**[If you believe this too, will you make a contribution to our campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=)**_ | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=)
---
Thank you for your support,
_Bettina _

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mHr_E1VpwXKJjGb6X2dusUoTq37UW3FdJt7eOerihG0=/Rvj-vQoFHIDdZ5HBXmjCOzxTpt7H-AD6mPaEMgyDuyk=)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

| In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground – and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. | | It’s been one week since voters decided that I was the right choice to flip TX-10 this fall — and in that short week, **so much has happened:**
* I’ve been attacked by the NRCC, a Republican dark money group — they’ve smeared me as “crazy,” “toxic,” _and their favorite insult, a “socialist”_
* Republican dark money groups have placed **huge** ad buys in our district
* My Republican opponent, Michael McCaul, spent an entire day attacking us on Twitter
* We’ve made HUGE progress toward our $25,000 General Election Goal — **we have just $3,010 left to raise!**

I don’t need to tell you what’s at stake this year — we have a man in the Oval Office whose cruelty knows no bounds. And whether or not he gets reelected, we need to hold the House to start to undo any of the damage he’s done. If we work together, we can flip this seat and expand our House majority. name: Alex Koren
subject: broken promises
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Suncoast News Network just covered the broken promises Vern Buchanan has made to our seniors. It’s a hard-hitting story, and one that Vern cannot dispute. Vern said he would stand with our seniors, but instead he voted to cut Medicare 6 times. SIX TIMES.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18338565/225417981/-940294256?refcode=072120-es-snn-video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY3MGVlZC01OGNiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F5f9qaQ3K8htXSLEr3b4OgN6n0qkMK8VzEemEM-O1c=&emci=98d1a66e-f3c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=49f70eed-58cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

The Suncoast News Network just covered the broken promises Vern Buchanan has made to our seniors. It’s a [**hard-hitting story**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18338566/225417982/-819467464?refcode=072120-es-snn-video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY3MGVlZC01OGNiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F5f9qaQ3K8htXSLEr3b4OgN6n0qkMK8VzEemEM-O1c=&emci=98d1a66e-f3c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=49f70eed-58cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644), and one that Vern cannot dispute.

Vern said he would stand with our seniors, but instead he voted to cut Medicare 6 times. SIX TIMES.
**[Click here to watch the video detailing Vern’s betrayal to our seniors:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18338567/225417983/-968471936?refcode=072120-es-snn-video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY3MGVlZC01OGNiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F5f9qaQ3K8htXSLEr3b4OgN6n0qkMK8VzEemEM-O1c=&emci=98d1a66e-f3c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=49f70eed-58cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18338568/225417984/-968471936?refcode=072120-es-snn-video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY3MGVlZC01OGNiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F5f9qaQ3K8htXSLEr3b4OgN6n0qkMK8VzEemEM-O1c=&emci=98d1a66e-f3c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=49f70eed-58cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18338569/225417985/-968471936?refcode=072120-es-snn-video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY3MGVlZC01OGNiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F5f9qaQ3K8htXSLEr3b4OgN6n0qkMK8VzEemEM-O1c=&emci=98d1a66e-f3c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=49f70eed-58cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)
He betrayed us. He betrayed the people of the Suncoast. And he betrayed seniors across our nation.

We can’t let him betray us again.

Alex Koren

name: Greg Stanton
subject: The Election Day Homestretch Is Here—Are You Ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

If you can believe it, we're now less than 105 days from Election Day. With so much on the line this November, we need as much help to drum up support for Democrats running in some crucial races right here at home.

**[Will you join us in making a contribution so that Democrats in Arizona and across the country can get us back on track by providing health care, sustainable jobs, and stability in Washington to all Americans?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q3SfOOpRI4dSDIrq8w-BB6eGfmmjXqbSxzd4tmjp1yg=/_G9fHxMkUPGjtiQocGcVKFL6oaCb4k6-LNAV7vggVKA=?refcode=X_071720_100Days_A)**

> _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mara=20Mellstrom=20=28Team=20Mace=29?=
subject: VP Pence is visiting our district. Here’s why.
body:
Vice President Pence is visiting the Lowcountry this week — he knows that my race is one that Republicans absolutely must win if we want to take back | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/23d8e606f18c/how-we-flip-the-house-2088214?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=703c0fd092&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1100322d45&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Hey,

_We have BIG news. _

**Vice President Pence is visiting the Lowcountry today because he knows that our race is one that Republicans absolutely must win if we want to take back the House. ** We're honored to have him visit our district and we want him to know that our grassroots movement is fired up, ready to go, and all in to restore principled, conservative leadership to the Lowcountry.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b3768b16a8&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Chip in any amount to put the Lowcountry first](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c4e300dd71&e=f1831b4ca2 "Chip in any amount to put the Lowcountry first")
---
| The Vice President has always been a strong supporter of our campaign and has had our backs since Day 1. He’s visited our district before — speaking at The Citadel in February for the annual Patriot Dinner where he offered Nancy his support.

_It was a special moment for our campaign, and for Nancy personally. When Nancy was waitressing at Waffle House, she never imagined that the Vice President of the United States would know who she was — let alone offer her his support in front of thousands of cadets. _

That dinner feels like a lifetime ago. Since then, we won our primary in historic fashion and our campaign has surged into the national spotlight.

We’re entering the home stretch of our campaign, and we need to make the most of opportunities like this.

**[That’s why we're asking you to show Vice President how strong our movement is and rush a donation to our campaign](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e9c90f54f1&e=f1831b4ca2)**[**.**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f36ebe307d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Rush a donation to our campaign as VP Pence arrives](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=228adc4829&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation to our campaign as VP Pence arrives")
---
| **This visit is a big deal for our campaign and we want to make the most out of it, so I had our team set up a Money Bomb.**

_That means if you want to double your impact, you can pledge to donate the same amount on Thursday._
---
| [Join our Money Bomb](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=23ef078c5c&e=f1831b4ca2 "Join our Money Bomb")
---
| Thank you for your support — you’ll be hearing from us again soon.

Best,

Mara Mellstrom
---
| |
---

---

He’s visited our district before — speaking at The Citadel in February for the annual Patriot Dinner where he offered Nancy his support. It was a special moment for our campaign, and for Nancy personally. When Nancy was waitressing at Waffle House, she never imagined that the Vice President of the United States would know who she was — let alone offer her his support in front of thousands of cadets. That dinner feels like a lifetime ago. Since then, we won our primary in historic fashion and our campaign has surged into the national spotlight. We’re entering the home stretch of our campaign, and we need to make the most of opportunities like this. | "Rush a donation to our campaign as VP Pence arrives" | This visit is a big deal for our campaign and we want to make the most out of it, so I had our team set up a Money Bomb. That means if you want to double your impact, you can pledge to donate the same amount on Thursday. | "Join our Money Bomb" | Thank you for your support — you’ll be hearing from us again soon. Best, Mara Mellstrom | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 ZOHO, All rights reserved. You're receiving this email because you signed up for updates about Zoho. Our mailing address is: 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | | | | | | | | | | | |

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: need your support (Stacey's request)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend - did you see Stacey's request for you?
---
Stacey knows as well as I do that we can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats, give everyday Georgians a voice in their government and restore moral leadership to Washington. But we've got an uphill battle ahead, with my opponent, Kelly Loeffler, flooding this race with attack ads and spending $20 million of her own fortune to buy this seat.
That's why I need your help, friend. We're facing down our next critical fundraising deadline and if we want to flip Georgia blue, we can't afford to fall short of our fall short of our $50,000 goal. **Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this people-powered campaign - so I have to ask: **
**[Please, will you give $5 or more now- before midnight tonight - to help Reverend Warnock flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? With you, me and Stacey working together, I know we can win this fight. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e589/288179be/98fd862/348e7a38/3248929437/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzg5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk389-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks, friend, I really appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: re: Rev. Raphael Warnock

| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes -- and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e589/288179be/98fd862/348e7a38/3248929437/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzg5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk389-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first Black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against a critical mid-month deadline - but with time running out, he's still falling short and can't make up the difference without your support. So I have to ask: [Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now - before the midnight deadline - to help Reverend Warnock flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e589/288179be/98fd862/348e7a38/3248929437/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzg5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk389-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e589/288179be/98fd862/348e7a38/3248929437/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzg5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk389-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e589/288179be/98fd862/348e7a39/3248929437/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: [URGENT] your response requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Just a few weeks ago now, we watched on our televisions how the Far-Left Liberal and Radical mob took to our streets and slashed away history......... Peter, Just a few weeks ago now, we watched on our televisions how the Far-Left Liberal and Radical mob took to our streets and slashed away history.
Anarchists were unleashed on our streets to cause mayhem. They were released to cause fear.
They defaced the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., struck down statues of abolitionists, and have even threatened to DESTROY one of America’s most historic sites, Mount Rushmore.
**[Peter, I wanted to get a feel as to where YOU stood on this issue... Do YOU support the tearing down of our historical statues?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8a8bb745520440028b21a1513c82a319&_e=0lXThbd1_dQ2oPUvLIrwot94_zxkcWpg5JXjSSRsmpxzohIa4PBqMYlgG0bbXgU4Yzp89XROkM44fmT2elMsB3IKVF4pZnSAQEc36L9ZhAx2oErxSw6iWzPIcrik6HJeXmdUvBXfnrj3WXVqxon6I-q3aJSXRskEffilLlWUtZ_SdSRMBfTMDcWg-8_r2oqwRArp0DJkHE8Xe-yaF50bX_pVRzSlrxBAmQbX9aVyQ1z99aMNW9zMYrXxGK3R7da34bpKxnyV4xRyPMQKQsXCO5iGc7VoFy5rZO4lXYySe08NzjRGwdswpGwEweLEq3FbGiwKTV5RQNlgPEo2xV6hkLIJUlaxg4aoc8X5KzrrJbcjKrBHxeiD_wYVoEopdZr9d0mqZPzsRHS7EmoJjCup2clrbOb_D2ic99D5TdWnHIx4el9kHIkFYSdZbxomDZRM)**

How do you defend tearing down a statue of Fredrick Douglas, a man who first escaped slavery himself, and then sought to end the practice of slavery, before and during the Civil War.
**Do you support tearing down statues?** [**RESPOND NOW**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8a8bb745520440028b21a1513c82a319&_e=0lXThbd1_dQ2oPUvLIrwot94_zxkcWpg5JXjSSRsmpxzohIa4PBqMYlgG0bbXgU4Yzp89XROkM44fmT2elMsB3IKVF4pZnSAQEc36L9ZhAx2oErxSw6iWzPIcrik6HJeXmdUvBXfnrj3WXVqxon6I-q3aJSXRskEffilLlWUtZ_SdSRMBfTMDcWg-8_r2oqwRArp0DJkHE8Xe-yaF50bX02CqBOG8g0nb6Nww0aWOBW_3hb-iuTQLuyRh3cpDCh1dTOntmCT7unzchQQZ5zjf5JgB0kaMVMHAswggz_xOCW38wPIBbeQ72w8dfo4JYtayOg9uZbZ2mt4J56p1sEWZgq1BSgUFjGtyqg-IzGqDY71q6NJ4OU_sxR59sPYFPFORZr5xqvnMxd1mKIDmI7AtRI9McdC9twjyUf_xmz9XLyNe3RcVGt93x3r26BeB1Qm) Peter, please be certain to let me know where you stand on this issue.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Your Calls STOPPED the Bad Deal
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=1)
---
Peter -- I can't thank you and the supporters of Action 4 Liberty enough. When we ask you to call or email, thousands of people do it. And it makes a difference! **The Legislature adjourned sine die last night with no bonding debt bill or massive compromise on Walz' illegal powers!** This last week was crazy. We went into the weekend hearing that House Minority Leader Kurt Daudt was horse trading a Fake End Powers Bill for the bonding bill. That was the last line of defense to make sure we didn't add more debt to the state credit card while Walz' still had his power. But you reached out to him and showed him that Minnesotans were watching what's happening at the Capitol. **Several of you received a reply from him on Monday trying to trick you about Action 4 Liberty and divert your attention to Rep Munson. But you didn't fall for his gimmick.** Meanwhile, he leaked his draft [Fake End Powers Bill](http://www.action4liberty.com/fake_end_powers_bill?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=2) to the media that he was using to horse trade for bonding debt. What a shame! Your phone calls and emails put the pressure on him and his caucus...they never would've gotten away with passing a Fake End Power Bill as long as we were watching. **Governor Walz' powers expire on August 13th. If he wants to extend them for the sixth month, he MUST call the legislature back to the Capitol. And that's where the big showdown will happen.**
## WE NEED TO FLIP FIVE MORE DEMOCRATS!
When we started our effort to End Walz' Powers, we only got 15 votes in the House and Senate Majority Leader Gazelka refused to hear the bill. Now it's passed in the Senate twice and four House Democrats have voted for it. The path to success here is really simple. We have to **TURN UP THE HEAT** on these rural Democrats. Every voter in their district needs to know that their legislator is protecting the governor, while voting against their liberty.
## Can you help equip Action 4 Liberty for the final battle?
### [**DONATE $25 TO REACH 1,150 OF THEIR VOTERS**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=3)
### [**DONATE $50 TO REACH 2,300 OF THEIR VOTERS**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=4)
### [**DONATE $100 TO REACH 4,600 OF THEIR VOTERS**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=5)
### [**DONATE $250 TO REACH 11,500 OF THEIR VOTERS**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=6)
It's time we End Walz' Illegal Emergency Powers once and for all. No more threat of stay at home orders. No more shutting down of restaurants, bars, gyms and hair salons. No mask mandate. We MUST prepare for the next Special Session and get the remaining five Democrats to come our way! [**Donate today and help us prepare for the final battle. It's time to End Walz' powers and restore our liberties.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=7) **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_stopped_the_bad&n=10), software for leaders.

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Sign our petition to protect WV voters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Tell Mac Warner to protect WV voters
Fellow Democrat,
Every registered voter in West Virginia deserves to cast their vote safely and without obstacles.

**Mac Warner is leaving voters in the dark with no plan.**

In the primary election, voters received an absentee ballot application and were able to vote from the safety of their own homes. That is what voters are expecting again for the general election.

[**Sign our petition to tell Mac Warner that every registered voter in West Virginia should receive an absentee ballot application due to the circumstances and safety concerns surrounding the COVID-19 pandemic.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18344644/225510213/-1765488719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFiYmJiYi03N2NiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9bTrrudAUJUSkNrqmL7sp_moii52be6QieEu3M-InA=&emci=dc511626-71cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=961bbbbb-77cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=5094937)

West Virginia currently has the highest rate of COVID-19 spread in the country and we have the most vulnerable population. Our safety should be top priority.
As Secretary of State, Mac Warner should be protecting your right to vote and instead he's placing obstacles in your way in the middle of a pandemic.

**[Sign our petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18344645/225510214/-1765488719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFiYmJiYi03N2NiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9bTrrudAUJUSkNrqmL7sp_moii52be6QieEu3M-InA=&emci=dc511626-71cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=961bbbbb-77cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=5094937),** and let him know that West Virginia voters should be protected no matter their party affiliation. Your right to vote should not be put in danger because he refuses to implement a plan for COVID-19.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18344646/225510215/-1765488719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFiYmJiYi03N2NiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9bTrrudAUJUSkNrqmL7sp_moii52be6QieEu3M-InA=&emci=dc511626-71cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=961bbbbb-77cb-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=5094937)

name: Wendy Davis
subject: How we flip Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c43/1357436581/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

MJ and I have got a lot of work to do to win Texas and we're going to need your help. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain **[why I'm asking you to support my dear friend MJ.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c42/1357436581/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wendydavis?refcode=email_20200721.1nd__1775__&amount=10")**

**Texas is a battleground state.** We have a real shot to flip it this year. And that means doing everything we can to register and turn out voters in every district across the state. Up and down the ballot, across the state, we have strong candidates running for state and national offices because they believe in things like protecting our health care, defending Medicare and Social Security, ending the gun violence epidemic -- and so much more. Turning out our voters, from the smallest of these races to congressional races like mine, means a better shot at winning statewide for MJ.

**[We can win, but it's not going to be easy. Pitch in now to help MJ build the powerful grassroots campaign we'll need to win this election and flip Texas! ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c42/1357436581/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wendydavis?refcode=email_20200721.1nd__1775__&amount=10")**

Texans all over are saying _enough is enough_. We have had it with politicians who sell us out to the highest special interest bidder, and march in lockstep with powerful DC bosses like Mitch McConnell -- instead of doing what's right for Texas.

Just look at MJ's opponent, Sen. John Cornyn. After 18 years in the Senate as Mitch McConnell's henchman, he's seen his approval ratings tank -- to 10 points below _Ted Cruz!_ \-- so now he's calling in all his DC allies from the Koch network to Donald Trump Jr. to prop him up.

MJ and I can win because Texans respect toughness, and neither of us shy from a tough fight. Like when MJ took on the Pentagon to open thousands of military jobs to women and I stood up for Texas women and filibustered for our reproductive rights.

But it's going to take a lot of hard work and resources to defeat the big money pouring into Texas to back up our opponents. **[Will you pitch in now to make sure MJ has the resources we need to flip Texas?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c42/1357436581/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wendydavis?refcode=email_20200721.1nd__1775__&amount=10")**

Thanks y'all!

Wendy

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c42/1357436581/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wendydavis?refcode=email_20200721.1nd__1775__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c41/1357436581/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1775&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c40/1357436581/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef5/7f51f7bc/41aee629/4ef65c47/1357436581/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

body:
LaTurner leading by 13 points over Watkins | |
---
| | | Patriot,

The first set of general election numbers are in, and they tell us exactly what we have known all along. _**Steve Watkins can not hold the Kansas 2nd congressional district against the Democrat opponent.**_ See for yourself [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f826342ec3&e=1050d051da).

[Will you chip in to help make sure Jake wins the primary? Anything helps $100, $50, or even $10.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0fdd196dae&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9a6444e042&e=1050d051da)
---
| In a survey taken last week, voters say if the general election were held today, they would overwhelmingly elect Democrat Michelle De La Isla over Steve Watkins._**With LaTurner as the Republican challenger, however, the results put LaTurner in the lead. Jake LaTurner is clearly the best, and likely, only chance Republicans have to hold KS-02 this cycle. **_

See the full poll [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=322657d039&e=1050d051da).

This is the biggest reason Jake got into the race in the first place. Democrats know Steve is a vulnerable candidate who doesn't have what it takes to win against liberal Democrat Michelle De La Isla. We must have a strong Republican to stop the Democrats from taking over this seat so we do not give another inch of ground to Nancy Pelosi and her liberal agenda.

[Your support will help us get us across the finish line in the primary against Watkins.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9d6a396f29&e=1050d051da) We have tremendous momentum built up right now and will make it all the way with help from you!

Click [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=94f4a0e93c&e=1050d051da) to contribute to the conservative candidate who can win!

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Biden for President
subject: Quick Questionnaire for the Democratic National Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're less than a month away from the start of the Democratic National Convention. |
---
Peter, we're less than a month away from the start of the Democratic National Convention, where Joe will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President!

We know how excited everyone is to see Democrats across the country join forces to beat Donald Trump!

Convention Week is going to be an amazing time to see all of our hard work come together -- and we hope you'll join us virtually for some of the action!

**And since this is a great time to check-in and make sure we have an updated supporter record for you, we have a brand new, short questionnaire about Democratic issues and priorities for you to take.**

[**Will you take a few seconds to take our new survey today so we have some updated information about your issue priorities before the Convention starts?**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9475/2646646250/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | **Convention Attendee Issue Survey**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Date:** 7/21/2020
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9475/2646646250/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
| [BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9474/2646646250/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Over the Convention's four days, we'll hear from Democrats across the country, nominate Joe Biden and his running mate as our official ticket for President and Vice President of the United States, and show the world our strong, unified party.

But after the Convention, Peter, the real work begins. We'll be jumping headfirst into the most crucial months of this race, so we need to make sure we include feedback from folks across the country about what issues are on the ballot this November.

That's why we're asking you to take our brand-new survey. We know we ask for your feedback a lot, but it's all to make sure our campaign continues to reflect the people it belongs to (that's you, Peter!).

**So, if you could take a couple of minutes today to make sure your record is up to date by answering a few short questions on our Convention Attendee Issue Survey, we 'd be so grateful for your response! Click below to begin the survey:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Convention-Attendee-Issue-Survey**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9475/2646646250/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thanks for everything you do,

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9473/2646646250/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9472/2646646250/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9471/2646646250/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9470/2646646250/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946f/2646646250/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946e/2646646250/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946d/2646646250/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946c/2646646250/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946b/2646646250/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946a/2646646250/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946d/2646646250/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9469/2646646250/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d946c/2646646250/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b876/1cd0ac28/171905212/357d9468/2646646250/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Lara Trump
subject: Are you ready for Texas?

| Friends, we're just 15 weeks away from the 2020 elections. We have 15 weeks to get 361,046 Republican and Unaffiliated voters out to vote on November 3rd for President Trump, Governor Sununu, and our entire Republican ticket- with Democrats amassing big donor checks to get out their voters in New Hampshire, we need the resources to fight back. **What we’re up against in this race:** Joe Biden and the DNC joined forces to raise over $360,000 per donor, creating a massive influx of big dollars on the Democrat side. Jeanne Shaheen and Joe Biden will spend any amount in order to defeat us in November. **What we need to fight back:** With the Presidency and Senate control on the line this year, we need to raise $10,000 this week to win New Hampshire and defeat Joe Biden and Jeanne Shaheen. **How you can help today:** [Chip in $5.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcwMjQ3OTM5NzU3NTc3NTk4JmM9bzlyMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzQyNDM2NjUmZD1qNncwYThk.6JIfjX9OEGdoAnxTKsXUezHzv6UL-GOSb2AW0FmK2yo) It may not sound like much, but your $5 plus someone else’s $5 help us fight back against the Democrat big money machine. Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats are going to finance New Hampshire Democrats, and we need to be able to fight back with grassroots contributors like you. **[Rush $5 or more right now to help win New Hampshire in November and defeat Joe Biden and Jeanne Shaheen!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcwMjQ3OTM5NzU3NTc3NTk4JmM9bzlyMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzQyNDM2NjgmZD1kNW4ybzRz.2F3gNwmlan85acmgHKbRckaEHsKl4o7OQ_Wj09h3or8 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk1768-fr-nd&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Shootings and Other Crimes Spike in the Poorest Neighborhoods When Cops Pull Back’
body:
If there’s one lesson from the unrest and anti-police agitation in the wake of George Floyd's death, it’s that poor minorities pay the highest price | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=186cf23d4b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Shootings and Other Crimes Spike in the Poorest Neighborhoods When Cops Pull Back’**

“If there’s one lesson from the unrest and anti-police agitation in the wake of the killing of George Floyd, it’s that poor minorities living in distressed neighborhoods pay the highest price—in fear and in blood—when the cops retreat and the worst elements feel emboldened,” Rich Lowry writes in _National Review_.

“The spikes in shootings in cities around the country haven’t taken place in high-end neighborhoods . . . No, they blight the most marginal neighborhoods and make everyday life a hazard for people who have no option but to live in a tough place.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=884ee07588&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “A simple, additional runway at the Taos, New Mexico, airport took more than 20 years to complete because of the permitting and approval process . . . The future of our country’s economy depends, in no small part, upon federal departments and agencies taking a hard look at their regulatory agendas,” Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao writes in [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ccdc0837b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Anarchists and rioters have wreaked havoc on Portland, Ore., for nearly two months. Democrats have excused and emboldened them, and they’re now claiming the real problem is that federal law enforcement has intervened to restore order . . . If radicals feel emboldened, that’s because Portland has long allowed political violence to occur with impunity,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0095fba45&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “After many decades of a trade policy dominated by geopolitics and the blind pursuit of efficiency, the United States now has a new worker-focused trade policy . . . Some bitter-enders will continue to argue that we should just let the jobs go and then attempt to glue the pieces of society back together again. Fortunately, the country as a whole has moved on and will be stronger for it,” U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer writes in [_Foreign Affairs_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4be8165504&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8684ee967e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d171c684f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5efd576abf)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Hey team,

As Eugene’s Campaign Manager, I take a lot of pride in the grassroots movement we’ve built here in South Central PA. Since day one, our campaign has been powered by hard-working people giving and doing what they can because they want to see real change for our community.

On the other hand, Scott Perry is relying on special interests to _buy_ him this election and keep his power and influence, all while turning his back on the people in our community every chance he gets. **Team, our representative has forgotten who he’s supposed to be working for, and it’s just one reason why we need to send a leader like Eugene to Congress in November.**

[**But change this big, in a race this close, means all of us working together to _stand up_ against special interests and _reject_ the status quo. Peter,

_Did you see what’s happening in our country?_

In _**Portland**_ , there have been _**50 DAYS**_ of consecutive riots where businesses and government buildings are under _**CONSTANT SIEGE**_.

In _**Seattle**_ , rioters took over multiple city blocks and set up a Democrat sanctioned “ _**ANARCHY ZONE**_ ”!

In _**New York City**_ , our own NYPD officers are being _**TARGETED**_ and _**ATTACKED**_ on the job by violent left-wing groups, while being abandoned by politicians like Bill de Blasio.

Democrat politicians have emboldened the mob and allowed the violence to move into our backyard. **We can’t allow Long Island to be the next target of this violence**. This is why we must keep Long Island **_RED_** this November. The leftist mob will come for Long Island next, and Jackie Gordon will do nothing to stop it. But I need your help. **[Peter, will you help me Keep Long Island Red by helping me defeat Jackie Gordon and the left-wing mob this November?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0ae63d989c3f4f71941758638a0ccdac&_e=mVY0JPfZAOygWg1kBU_4-CXu-jmQCY7GH2qvLOFsz6fIjh2meUHzjHtuawSOVkg2iAY8k6kJKv2iSTxEr-ZmFTaEkv93RTngC7UeCeW9cYrvVLAubxfne8QbsJy09-iWnyJiNmrpwn25iZ_Ahn6ROmGJqzwTPxYEZ-A0SKMVVlZPczYSZ1FTpX6IQRrGDj6I_Q_ef-WhiW6jDwHaVaAI2PUvg47ByUgYVuJh5e5RCSjdm3V9EKZvNFfVC6V0A1_PIw9xcYtibJ_MHvlTLxi0nNm6fE1-gG1klrUyOieja0LnDNfnCaCsTHvLbc2bTYrknoNu1WklVWmJt-6sUJIlITyLYGseJ84km5CPmAn29wBgnu4hKYG3yaL2O6VaZlAr0wRjaEJYsjiw3yLBkwjRn4zTrWS03AkjBctMUkrKgoxzsSMdFBTTvE2PMOH2Imec)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Support nationwide vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't cater to their fears.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, I want to share remarks from two presidents -- one, Lyndon B. Johnson, upon signing the _Voting Rights Act_ in 1965: _"Millions of Americans are denied the right to vote because of their color. This law will ensure them the right to vote. The wrong is one which no American, in his heart, can justify. The right is one which no American, true to our principles, can deny."_ And another, from President Trump, during a rally in Arizona on June 23: _"The Democrats are also trying to rig the election by sending tens of millions of ballots using the China virus as the excuse for allowing people not to go to the polls...This will be, in my opinion, the most corrupt election in the history of our country, and we cannot let this happen."_ President Johnson knew, like we know now, that making it easier to vote is a tremendous achievement in a democracy. Vote-by-mail is an extension of the work he began in 1965 and a true work in democratic leadership -- one President Trump seems to have no interest in furthering. **[Recent elections have proven that we need national investment in vote-by-mail before November's elections -- if you agree, add your name next to mine right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Join-the-Call-for-Nationwide-Vote-by-Mail?utm_source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&utm_campaign=nationwidevbm&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Join-the-Call-for-Nationwide-Vote-by-Mail?utm_source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&utm_campaign=nationwidevbm&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf)
---
Vote-by-mail is the easiest, safest, most reliable method of voting there is -- period. We already know that here in Washington state and in traditionally red states like Utah, too. This isn't a partisan issue.
In Washington state, vote-by-mail has been an unprecedented spectacular success, and we've been thrilled to see that voter participation has gone up -- that's why I'm confident that there is zero reason not to have a mail-in ballot under any condition, and certainly not when Americans have to risk their lives to cast their ballots.
It's clear that Donald Trump and his Republican allies are afraid that more people will vote with vote-by-mail provisions. But that shouldn't be a fear -- it should be a hope.
Because when voting irregularities disproportionately affect communities of color -- like the long lines we've seen at voting places across the country affecting especially, and disproportionately, communities with majority Black populations -- we're not living up to the ideals of voting rights icons. We're catering to the absurd fears of Donald Trump.
**[Vote-by-mail is the next step in the fight against voter suppression and the safest, easiest, and most reliable voting method there is -- if you agree, add your name next to mine to call for nationwide vote-by-mail before November's election.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Join-the-Call-for-Nationwide-Vote-by-Mail?utm_source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&utm_campaign=nationwidevbm&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Join-the-Call-for-Nationwide-Vote-by-Mail?utm_source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&source=ema_2020-07-21_nationwidevbm&utm_campaign=nationwidevbm&utm_medium=ema&t=8&akid=8104%2E868730%2EsGeYFf)
---

subject: Nancy Pelosi just resigned!
body:
I need your help.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ryanchamberlin.com/4-weeks-left-you-can-help-me-win-12603247?e=d703fa4981)
---
| |
---
| | My fellow conservatives,
Unfortunately, that headline will never printed, for Nancy Pelosi will never be allowed to resign. Even after this election cycle is over, she will go on and on, whining and screaming and belly-aching. There’s only one way to stop it. Nancy must never permitted the chance to resign. We must fire her!
That’s right. Fire her. I don’t care what Nancy’s second career is, and I don’t care if she ever finds a job again. She needs to be fired for a number of reasons including the following:
* Raising the American debt ceiling multiple times.
* Putting America $26 Trillion in debt.
* Weakening the American military.
* Funding abortion on demand,
* Blocking funding for border security.
* Supporting judges that infringe on our gun rights.
*

I will fire her, but I cannot do it alone. I need your help to be able to go to Congress. Please view our video in this link. [https://bit.ly/RFCFinalPush](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=a5856af3ee&e=d703fa4981)
If you like what you see in this ad, then I hope you will consider contributing to our campaign today at this [https://bit.ly/RFCFinalPush](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=909bae4014&e=d703fa4981)
American is counting on us.
Sincerely,
Ryan

subject: Why Jon refuses corporate PAC donations

body:
Jon will represent the people, not corporations. |
---
Friend,

**Jon Ossoff's opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue, has taken MILLIONS of dollars in donations from corporate PACs. He even sells them meetings: four meetings a year for $7,500.**

**The corruption is blatant. And corruption kills.**

Here's how it works: _Perdue takes big contributions from Pharma PACs and lobbyists. Then he votes to let drug companies rip us off. Then people die._

**Friend, you know that unlike his opponent, Jon Ossoff will represent the people rather than corporations. Jon pledged on Day 1 of his campaign to REFUSE donations from corporate PACs.**

body:

We're working hard to ensure we reach as many voters as we can to talk to them about why Michelle is the different kind of leader we need fighting for us in Congress.

body:

**[Take our survey and let us know how you're going to help this team defeat Sen. Cornyn in November >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef1/7f51f7bc/41a3cc52/4ef65cf8/2122565437/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-vol-survey")** | **What steps will you take to flip Texas?**
* Donating to MJ's campaign
* Making phone calls to voters
* Joining our text team
* Something else!

[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef1/7f51f7bc/41a3cc52/4ef65cf8/2122565437/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-vol-survey")

We're going to need all the help we can get to flip Texas and elect MJ this November -- **[how will you pitch in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef1/7f51f7bc/41a3cc52/4ef65cf8/2122565437/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-vol-survey")**

name: James Mackler
subject: People-powered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Without you, this wouldn't be possible ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c2/18d6a294/4c8d9405/26d7f7c0/174112380/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Team Mackler -- I cannot thank you enough! Our pre-primary FEC report closed last Friday, and this grassroots team stepped up in a real way. Between July 1 - July 17, we raised more than $100,000 and closed the reporting period with more than $600,000 on hand -- putting us in a great position to flip this open seat in just over 100 days. Boiling these numbers down tells an even more compelling story.
* 94% of the individual contributions were under $200;
* **93% of the individual contributions were under $100;**
* 75% of the donors were Tennesseans;
* _**36% of the donors were first-time campaign investors.**_

This people-powered support means so much to me and it shows real momentum building for sending better leadership to Washington. Unlike our opponent, I don't take corporate PAC dollars and my friends at the bank aren't lining up to give me a multi-million-dollar sweetheart loan to fuel my campaign. It's this grassroots network that fuels our fight for Tennessee, helps share my story of service to voters across the state, and keeps our television ads on the air. **With only 16 days left to go until the primary, we need to keep this momentum going.** Unlike my opponent who has promised to rubber stamp the special-interest agenda of Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, I'm stepping forward to serve again -- in the Senate -- in a moment of crisis. [_**Every dollar we raise helps us share my story of service with Tennessee voters before Election Day. If you 're able, please chip in today to keep our momentum going through the primary and up until November 3rd.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c2/18d6a294/4c8d9405/26d7f7c1/174112380/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200721?refcode=jme200721_m_other&refcode2=107423") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c2/18d6a294/4c8d9405/26d7f7ce/174112380/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjEiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200721?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200721_m_&refcode2=107423")

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Ohio GOP Leader Arrested for Pay to Play
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/MH-z4r1igR51RY-NlWMQFijwJhVf58fvVuxIJCidHs0=) In case you missed it, [the leader of the GOP in Ohio and 4 others were arrested this morning.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/MH-z4r1igR51RY-NlWMQFijwJhVf58fvVuxIJCidHs0=) The Speaker of the House, Larry Householder, amassed $60 million in bribes, used it to gain power as the Speaker, and then bailed out the company paying him. **If you weren 't sure why I ran for State Senate instead of Congress, this is a big reason.** I have been running for office in the face of this corrupt system, and fighting money in politics for almost 4 years. It's why I am running for State Senator with a no corporate PAC pledge-- to change politics in Ohio. We will never see change in this country if we don't change the way state legislatures are elected. The big money invested in these races by special interests has enabled extreme partisan gerrymandering and politicians who stand up only for the wealthiest. We must fight dark money and with your grassroots support we can elect true public servants in November. Please consider a donation today. Even in the face of this clear corruption, we can win. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/QdjUtWt-FEnoJccaLLrKSKsVzNYDdTN2KCYKONpCwc4=?refcode=7.21) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/jrjymuXrd5EXMrgf5sPRkqAg0j-SEb7plIpI0NVlYCo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/Ivm0WlvDHi-05_0kRmPqSn0j4uDhBcyCYqoH524Crvo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/Pp1kQkknoMWnnwZTK3YXenqL7qyPHsKpXXIV5aIq80Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bpr1Welr0g_NU3kqFaWznrA-W0SJjGINyVnExiXMt8w=/zNkBV3byTgJrVFzIYXVISHXUKeFzEshG4_pzFezTONs=)

clean_body: | | | | = In case you missed it, = The Speaker of the House, Larry Householder, amassed $60 million in bribes, used it to gain power as the Speaker, and then bailed out the company paying him. If you weren 't sure why I ran for State Senate instead of Congress, this is a big reason. I have been running for office in the face of this corrupt system, and fighting money in politics for almost 4 years. It's why I am running for State Senator with a no corporate PAC pledge-- to change politics in Ohio. We will never see change in this country if we don't change the way state legislatures are elected. The big money invested in these races by special interests has enabled extreme partisan gerrymandering and politicians who stand up only for the wealthiest. We must fight dark money and with your grassroots support we can elect true public servants in November. Please consider a donation today.
